overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character walking through a rainy, dark coastal landscape at night. The character approaches and walks under a futuristic structure with glowing blue circular platforms, set against a moody, stormy sky with heavy rainfall.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark coastal beach with overhead transport strand

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dark wet sand toward the distant glowing structure

entered.detail: futuristic overhead tube structure with blue lights curving into the distance
dark rocky mountain formation silhouetted against the stormy sky
dark heavy rain clouds covering the night sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dark, rain-swept beach at night. An overhead transport strand with blue lights curves through the sky ahead, while a large coastal cliff rises on the right. Heavy rain falls continuously, creating a moody, atmospheric environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching futuristic terminal with neon blue lighting

events.description: blue neon lights from the terminal structure become visible in the distance
character moves from open beach onto the terminal platform area

agents.ego_description: continuing toward the glowing blue terminal structure, approaching the platform base

entered.detail: futuristic terminal structure with glowing blue circular platforms and central pillar
circular concrete platform with white markings on the ground

segments.scene_description: As the character approaches the terminal, the blue neon lighting becomes increasingly prominent, illuminating the rain and wet ground. The overhead transport strand passes behind view while the massive terminal structure with its glowing circular platforms dominates the center of the frame.

events.description: character stops walking and turns to look up at the circular platforms above

agents.ego_description: standing under the glowing platforms and looking upward at the structure

entered.detail: large disc-shaped platforms with bright blue neon edges suspended overhead

segments.scene_description: The character walks directly under the massive circular platforms, which glow with intense blue light. After stopping, the character looks up at the suspended discs while standing on the marked concrete platform. The surrounding landscape is obscured by the structure's bulk, creating an enclosed, futuristic atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a desolate, rain-swept beach toward the imposing interior of a futuristic transport terminal. It begins with the character walking along a dark coastline under a stormy night sky, with a glowing blue transport strand curving overhead and a massive cliff rising to the right. As the character advances, the blue neon lighting becomes increasingly prominent, cutting through the heavy rain to illuminate the wet ground and the looming terminal structure. The scene then shifts as the camera moves directly beneath the massive, glowing circular platforms that dominate the frame and obscure the surrounding landscape. Finally, the character comes to a halt on a marked concrete platform, looking up at the suspended discs within the enclosed, high-tech atmosphere.
